case_title: FRANCISCO AYALA VS. EDWIN EDGARDO NUNEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS PREVIOUSLY RETAINED ON 11-12-10, CASE NO. 835228, ARE RETAINED. GUILLERMO JIMINEZ INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AYALA, FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUNEZ, EDWIN EDGARDO $4,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,355.00, BASED ON THE ESTIMATED COST OF REPAIR, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S CAR IS A TOTAL LOSS, AND AWARDS DAMAGES FOR THE VALUE OF THE VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED OCT-07-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NUNEZ, EDWIN EDGARDO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NUNEZ, EDWIN EDGARDO
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,710.02 FILED BY AYALA, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT NUNEZ, EDWIN EDGARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
